variables.notes: Candidate list clearly misses the important SG&A row 'Sales and distribution expenses', so I selected from the full preview. Manual review is needed because duplicate labels ('Sales and distribution expenses' and 'Administrative expenses') make subtotal-vs-component identification ambiguous when using exact row labels only. I chose the unambiguous component rows 'Other Sales and distribution expenses' and 'Other Administrative expenses', plus 'Share-Based Compensation' as overhead. This may understate SG&A if the smaller duplicated component rows are distinct and should also be included. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Other Sales and distribution expenses
